body.title: Dashboard: Cloud% label bug + p95 outlier guard
body.result: Fixed dashboard label contradiction: renamed Cloud%→cloud calls and CloudMode→cloud_mode, putting cloud_mode gate first so the two metrics are clearly distinct. p95 outlier guard (60s cap) was already present. Added test_dashboard_terminal.py with 16 tests covering cloud_pct, p50/p95 outlier guard, label names, and valence_str.
body.description: Cloud% contradicts cloud_mode label; p95 window needs outlier guard. #247
